text:
is the captain of the Scout Regiment.

Appearance

Levi has his black hair styled in an undercut and dark swirly eyes. He wears the standard Scout Regiment uniform.

Personality

Levi is a short tempered person who gets easily agitated when someone calls him short. He is the prone topic of rumors due to him being humanity's strongest soldier.

Story

Levi is mentioned by Keith Sadies as humanity's strongest soldier and an excellent example when it comes to cleaning.

Levi busts in Erwin's office and asks him for explanations regarding his behavior, stating that his subordinates have been complaining about it. Erwin confesses his plans to get closer to the younger soldiers and Levi advises him to talk to the trainees instead. He comes along with his superior and watches him approach Eren, Mikasa, and Armin. However, they fail to notice a Titan on time and all end up swallowed. As they drown in the Titan's stomach, Levi expresses his annoyance about Erwin's eagerness to try to fit in with youngsters.

Relationships

Erwin Smith - Erwin is Levi's superior. The two appear to be friends, as Levi listens to his problems, advices, and is often seen by his side.
